question: उन घरों के लिए भूगोल आईडी (geography IDs) की सूची बनाएं जहां पूर्णता की स्थिति (completion status) 'Located' है, विशेष रूप से उन भूगोल आईडी के लिए जिनमें घरेलू विभाजन संख्या (household split numbers) की गणना शून्य से अधिक है।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T2.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Located' GROUP BY T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID HAVING COUNT(T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER) > 0
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT fhc.geography_id
FROM fact_household_core fhc
JOIN dim_household_status dhs ON fhc.household_status_id = dhs.household_status_id
WHERE dhs.completion_status ILIKE 'Located'
  AND fhc.household_split_number > 0;
raw_output:
SELECT DISTINCT fhc.geography_id
FROM fact_household_core fhc
JOIN dim_household_status dhs ON fhc.household_status_id = dhs.household_status_id
WHERE dhs.completion_status ILIKE 'Located'
  AND fhc.household_split_number > 0;
error: Mismatch (Order matters: False). Gold count: 2452. Pred count: 824.

question: प्रत्येक राज्य कोड के लिए, स्वयं राज्य कोड, हाउसहोल्ड आईडी की कुल संख्या और औसत हाउसहोल्ड स्प्लिट नंबर की सूची बनाएं।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE_CODE, COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID), AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_CODE;
predicted_sql: SELECT dgh.state_code, COUNT(fhc.household_id) AS total_household_id, AVG(fhc.household_split_number) AS avg_household_split_number FROM fact_household_core fhc JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy dgh ON fhc.geography_id = dgh.geography_id GROUP BY dgh.state_code;
raw_output: SELECT dgh.state_code, COUNT(fhc.household_id) AS total_household_id, AVG(fhc.household_split_number) AS avg_household_split_number FROM fact_household_core fhc JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy dgh ON fhc.geography_id = dgh.geography_id GROUP BY dgh.state_code;

question: उन घरों के लिए विशिष्ट भूगोल आईडी (geography IDs) सूचीबद्ध करें जहाँ या तो घरेलू विभाजन संख्या (household split number) 1 है या पूर्णता स्थिति (completion status) 'Located' है।
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER = 1 OR T2.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Located';
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT fact_household_core.geography_id
FROM fact_household_core
LEFT JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE fact_household_core.household_split_number = 1 OR dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located';
raw_output:
SELECT DISTINCT fact_household_core.geography_id
FROM fact_household_core
LEFT JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE fact_household_core.household_split_number = 1 OR dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located';

question: उन शीर्ष 10 जिला कोडों की सूची बनाएं जिनमें रिकॉर्ड की संख्या सबसे अधिक है, विशेष रूप से उन परिवारों के लिए जहां नए परिवार के विभाजन की संख्या (new household split number) शून्य से अधिक है, और उन्हें उनके जिला कोड के अनुसार समूहित (group) करें।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_CODE FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T2.NEW_HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER > 0 GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_CODE ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code, COUNT(fact_household_core.household_id) AS record_count
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
WHERE fact_household_core.new_household_split_number > 0
GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code
ORDER BY record_count DESC
LIMIT 10;
raw_output:
SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code, COUNT(fact_household_core.household_id) AS record_count
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
WHERE fact_household_core.new_household_split_number > 0
GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code
ORDER BY record_count DESC
LIMIT 10;
error: Mismatch (Order matters: True). Gold count: 10. Pred count: 10.

question: राजस्थान राज्य के लिए, राज्य कोड, घरेलू आईडी (household IDs) की कुल संख्या और औसत घरेलू विभाजन संख्या (average household split number) की सूची बनाएं, जिन्हें राज्य कोड के अनुसार समूहित (grouped) किया गया हो।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE_CODE, COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID), AVG(T2.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.STATE_CODE = 'Rajasthan' GROUP BY T1.STATE_CODE;
predicted_sql: SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.state_code, COUNT(fact_household_core.household_id) AS total_households, AVG(fact_household_core.household_split_number) AS avg_split_number FROM fact_household_core JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id WHERE dim_geography_hierarchy.state_code ILIKE 'Rajasthan' GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.state_code;
raw_output: SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.state_code, COUNT(fact_household_core.household_id) AS total_households, AVG(fact_household_core.household_split_number) AS avg_split_number FROM fact_household_core JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id WHERE dim_geography_hierarchy.state_code ILIKE 'Rajasthan' GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.state_code;

question: उन परिवारों के लिए भूगोल आईडी (geography IDs) की सूची बनाएं, जिन्हें भूगोल आईडी के अनुसार समूहित (grouped) और क्रमबद्ध (ordered) किया गया हो, जहाँ या तो पूर्णता की स्थिति (completion status) 'Located' है या नए परिवार के विभाजन की संख्या (household split number) 1 से अधिक है।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T2.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Located' OR T1.NEW_HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER > 1 GROUP BY T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID ORDER BY T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID
predicted_sql:
SELECT geography_id
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located' OR fact_household_core.new_household_split_number > 1
GROUP BY geography_id
ORDER BY geography_id;
raw_output:
SELECT geography_id
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located' OR fact_household_core.new_household_split_number > 1
GROUP BY geography_id
ORDER BY geography_id;

question: प्रत्येक जिले के लिए जिला कोड और घरेलू आईडी (household IDs) की कुल संख्या सूचीबद्ध करें, उन घरों को फ़िल्टर करें जहाँ नया घरेलू विभाजन नंबर (household split number) शून्य से अधिक है, और उच्चतम घरेलू संख्या वाले शीर्ष 10 जिले दिखाएं।

SELECT dgh.district_code, COUNT(DISTINCT fhc.household_id) AS total_households
FROM dim_geography_hierarchy dgh
JOIN fact_household_core fhc ON dgh.geography_id = fhc.geography_id
WHERE fhc.new_household_split_number > 0
GROUP BY dgh.district_code
ORDER BY total_households DESC
LIMIT 10;
raw_output:

question: उन जिला कोडों और घरेलू विभाजन संख्याओं (household split numbers) की कुल संख्या की सूची बनाएं जिनके लिए पूर्णता की स्थिति (completion status) 'बाहर चले गए' (Moved out) है, उन्हें उनके जिला कोड के अनुसार समूहित (group) करें, और केवल उच्चतम संख्या वाले शीर्ष 5 जिले दिखाएं।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_CODE, COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T3.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Moved out' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_CODE ORDER BY COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code, COUNT(fact_household_core.household_split_number) AS total_household_split_numbers
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Moved out'
GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code
ORDER BY total_household_split_numbers DESC
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:
SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code, COUNT(fact_household_core.household_split_number) AS total_household_split_numbers
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Moved out'
GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code
ORDER BY total_household_split_numbers DESC
LIMIT 5;

question: उन जिला कोडों और नए घरेलू विभाजन नंबरों की संख्या की सूची बनाएं जिनके घरों की पूर्णता स्थिति 'बाहर चले गए' (Moved out) है, उन्हें उनके जिला कोड के अनुसार समूहित करें, और केवल उच्चतम संख्या वाले शीर्ष 5 जिले दिखाएं।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_CODE, COUNT(T2.NEW_HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T3.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Moved out' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT_CODE ORDER BY COUNT(T2.NEW_HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER) DESC LIMIT 5
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code, COUNT(fact_household_core.household_id) AS number_of_new_household_split_numbers
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Moved out' AND fact_household_core.new_household_split_number > 2
GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code
ORDER BY number_of_new_household_split_numbers DESC
LIMIT 5;
raw_output:

LIMIT 5;

question: उन जिला कोडों और घरेलू आईडी (household IDs) की कुल संख्या की सूची बनाएं जहाँ नया घरेलू विभाजन नंबर (household split number) शून्य नहीं है, उन्हें उनके जिला कोड के अनुसार समूहित (group) करें और शीर्ष 10 परिणामों के लिए संख्या के घटते क्रम में व्यवस्थित करें।

GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code
ORDER BY total_household_ids DESC
LIMIT 10;

question: उन परिवारों के लिए अद्वितीय (unique) PSU कोड को आरोही क्रम में सूचीबद्ध करें जहाँ पूर्णता की स्थिति (completion status) 'Located' है, परिवार विभाजन संख्या (household split number) 0 है, और नई परिवार विभाजन संख्या (new household split number) 1 है।
gold_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.PSU_CODE FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T3.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Located' AND T2.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER = 0 AND T2.NEW_HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER = 1 ORDER BY T1.PSU_CODE ASC
predicted_sql:

FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located'
AND fact_household_core.household_split_number = 0
AND fact_household_core.new_household_split_number = 1
ORDER BY dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code ASC;
raw_output:

AND fact_household_core.household_split_number = 0

ORDER BY dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code ASC;

question: राजस्थान राज्य के उन परिवारों के लिए भौगोलिक पदानुक्रम (geography hierarchy) से पीएसयू (PSU) कोड की सूची बनाएं जहाँ पूर्णता की स्थिति (completion status) 'Located' है, उन्हें उनके पीएसयू कोड द्वारा समूहित करें, ताकि उनके घरेलू विभाजन संख्या (household split numbers) का कुल योग बिल्कुल शून्य हो, और परिणामों को पीएसयू कोड के अनुसार बढ़ते क्रम में व्यवस्थित करें।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.PSU_CODE FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T3 ON T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T3.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T3.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Located' AND T1.STATE_CODE = 'Rajasthan' GROUP BY T1.PSU_CODE HAVING SUM(T2.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER) = 0 ORDER BY T1.PSU_CODE ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE dim_geography_hierarchy.state_code ILIKE 'Rajasthan' AND dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located'
GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code
HAVING SUM(fact_household_core.household_split_number) = 0
ORDER BY dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code ASC;
raw_output:
SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE dim_geography_hierarchy.state_code ILIKE 'Rajasthan' AND dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located'
GROUP BY dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code
HAVING SUM(fact_household_core.household_split_number) = 0
ORDER BY dim_geography_hierarchy.psu_code ASC;

question: उन घरेलू आईडी (household IDs) की सूची बनाएं जहाँ प्रत्येक सदस्य की आयु कम से कम 46 वर्ष है, विशेष रूप से उन घरों को फ़िल्टर करें जिनमें 'विवाहित' (Married) वैवाहिक स्थिति कोड वाला कोई भी व्यक्ति नहीं है।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID FROM FACT_PERSON_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DEMOGRAPHIC_CODES AS T2 ON T1.DEMOGRAPHIC_CODE_ID = T2.DEMOGRAPHIC_CODE_ID WHERE T1.AGE >= 46 GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN T2.MARITAL_STATUS_CODE = 'Married' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0
predicted_sql:
SELECT fpc.household_id
FROM fact_person_core fpc
JOIN dim_demographic_codes ddc ON fpc.demographic_code_id = ddc.demographic_code_id
GROUP BY fpc.household_id
HAVING MIN(fpc.age) >= 46 AND COUNT(CASE WHEN ddc.marital_status_code ILIKE 'Married' THEN 1 END) = 0;
raw_output:
SELECT fpc.household_id
FROM fact_person_core fpc
JOIN dim_demographic_codes ddc ON fpc.demographic_code_id = ddc.demographic_code_id
GROUP BY fpc.household_id
HAVING MIN(fpc.age) >= 46 AND COUNT(CASE WHEN ddc.marital_status_code ILIKE 'Married' THEN 1 END) = 0;

question: उन परिवारों के लिए भूगोल आईडी (geography IDs) की सूची बनाएं, जहाँ या तो पूर्णता की स्थिति (completion status) 'Located' है या परिवार विभाजन संख्या (household split number) 1 है, इन्हें उनकी भूगोल आईडी द्वारा समूहित (grouped) करें और भूगोल आईडी के बढ़ते क्रम में व्यवस्थित करें।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_HOUSEHOLD_STATUS AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID WHERE T2.COMPLETION_STATUS = 'Located' OR T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER = 1 GROUP BY T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID ORDER BY T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID ASC
predicted_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT fact_household_core.geography_id
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located' OR fact_household_core.household_split_number = 1
GROUP BY fact_household_core.geography_id
ORDER BY fact_household_core.geography_id ASC;
raw_output:
SELECT DISTINCT fact_household_core.geography_id
FROM fact_household_core
JOIN dim_household_status ON fact_household_core.household_status_id = dim_household_status.household_status_id
WHERE dim_household_status.completion_status ILIKE 'Located' OR fact_household_core.household_split_number = 1
GROUP BY fact_household_core.geography_id
ORDER BY fact_household_core.geography_id ASC;

question: उन घरेलू आईडी (household IDs) की सूची बनाएं जहाँ सभी सदस्यों की आयु कम से कम 22 वर्ष है, लेकिन विशेष रूप से केवल वे घर जहाँ किसी भी सदस्य का वैवाहिक स्थिति कोड यह नहीं दर्शाता कि वे विवाहित हैं।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN FACT_PERSON_CORE AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T2.AGE >= 22 GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM DIM_DEMOGRAPHIC_CODES AS T3 WHERE T3.DEMOGRAPHIC_CODE_ID = T2.DEMOGRAPHIC_CODE_ID AND T3.MARITAL_STATUS_CODE = 'Married') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0
predicted_sql:
SELECT fpc.household_id
FROM fact_person_core fpc
JOIN dim_demographic_codes ddc ON fpc.demographic_code_id = ddc.demographic_code_id
GROUP BY fpc.household_id
HAVING MIN(fpc.age) >= 22 AND MAX(CASE WHEN ddc.marital_status_code ILIKE 'Married' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0;
raw_output:
SELECT fpc.household_id
FROM fact_person_core fpc
JOIN dim_demographic_codes ddc ON fpc.demographic_code_id = ddc.demographic_code_id
GROUP BY fpc.household_id
HAVING MIN(fpc.age) >= 22 AND MAX(CASE WHEN ddc.marital_status_code ILIKE 'Married' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0;

question: उन सभी घरों के लिए हाउसहोल्ड आईडी (household ID), हाउसहोल्ड नंबर (household number) और राज्य कोड (state code) की सूची बनाएं जहाँ हाउसहोल्ड स्प्लिट नंबर (household split number) शून्य नहीं है, यह सुनिश्चित करते हुए कि प्रत्येक समूह में कम से कम एक हाउसहोल्ड स्टेटस आईडी (household status ID) रिकॉर्ड हो, और परिणामों को हाउसहोल्ड आईडी के बढ़ते क्रम में व्यवस्थित करें।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T1.HOUSEHOLD_NUMBER, T2.STATE_CODE FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER != 0 GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T1.HOUSEHOLD_NUMBER, T2.STATE_CODE HAVING COUNT(T1.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID ASC
predicted_sql: SELECT fact_household_core.household_id, fact_household_core.household_number, dim_geography_hierarchy.state_code FROM fact_household_core INNER JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id WHERE fact_household_core.household_split_number != 0 AND fact_household_core.household_status_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY fact_household_core.household_id ASC;
raw_output: SELECT fact_household_core.household_id, fact_household_core.household_number, dim_geography_hierarchy.state_code FROM fact_household_core INNER JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id WHERE fact_household_core.household_split_number != 0 AND fact_household_core.household_status_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY fact_household_core.household_id ASC;

question: उन सभी घरों के लिए हाउसहोल्ड आईडी (household ID), हाउसहोल्ड नंबर (household number) और जिला कोड (district code) की सूची बनाएं जहां नया हाउसहोल्ड स्प्लिट नंबर (household split number) शून्य नहीं है और कम से कम एक हाउसहोल्ड स्टेटस आईडी (household status ID) दर्ज है, इन्हें हाउसहोल्ड आईडी के बढ़ते क्रम में व्यवस्थित करें।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T1.HOUSEHOLD_NUMBER, T2.DISTRICT_CODE FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T2 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T2.GEOGRAPHY_ID WHERE T1.NEW_HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER != 0 GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, T1.HOUSEHOLD_NUMBER, T2.DISTRICT_CODE HAVING COUNT(T1.HOUSEHOLD_STATUS_ID) > 0 ORDER BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID ASC
predicted_sql: SELECT fact_household_core.household_id, fact_household_core.household_number, dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code FROM fact_household_core INNER JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id WHERE fact_household_core.new_household_split_number <> 0 AND fact_household_core.household_status_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY fact_household_core.household_id ASC;
raw_output: SELECT fact_household_core.household_id, fact_household_core.household_number, dim_geography_hierarchy.district_code FROM fact_household_core INNER JOIN dim_geography_hierarchy ON fact_household_core.geography_id = dim_geography_hierarchy.geography_id WHERE fact_household_core.new_household_split_number <> 0 AND fact_household_core.household_status_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY fact_household_core.household_id ASC;

question: प्रत्येक व्यक्ति आईडी (person ID) और घरेलू विभाजन संख्या (household split number) के लिए, अधिकतम आयु और घरेलू विभाजन संख्या ज्ञात करें, उन्हें फ़िल्टर करें जहाँ अधिकतम आयु 13 से अधिक है, और अधिकतम आयु के अवरोही क्रम (descending order) में शीर्ष 10 परिणामों को सूचीबद्ध करें।
gold_sql: SELECT MAX(T2.AGE), T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_CORE AS T1 JOIN FACT_PERSON_CORE AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_SPLIT_NUMBER, T2.PERSON_ID HAVING MAX(T2.AGE) > 13 ORDER BY MAX(T2.AGE) DESC LIMIT 10;
